login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Aid management dashboard — accounts are created by administrators only

weeklyTracking.title: Weekly distribution tracking
weeklyTracking.subtitle: Shows aid delivered in the selected period. Older records remain in history.
weeklyTracking.searchPlaceholder: Search by beneficiary, phone, address, driver, or item…
weeklyTracking.empty: No aid delivered in the selected period.
weeklyTracking.emptyCategory: No aid delivered for this category in the selected period.
weeklyTracking.emptyFiltered: No records found for the selected filters.

dashboard.goDistDesc: View details and update delivery status

beneficiaries.title: Beneficiaries
beneficiaries.subtitle: Search by name, phone, or area
beneficiaries.deleteDesc: This will archive "{{name}}" and hide them from active lists. You can still find them in history if needed.
beneficiaries.forceArchiveSuccess: Open distributions were cancelled and the beneficiary was archived

beneficiariesHistory.title: Beneficiaries history
beneficiariesHistory.subtitle: Delivered aid only — what each beneficiary received over time
beneficiariesHistory.searchPlaceholder: Filter by name, phone, or area…
beneficiariesHistory.filtersDesc: Aid filters match completed deliveries (delivered line items). Search runs on the server.
beneficiariesHistory.filterItemHint: Choose a category first to filter by a specific catalog item.
beneficiariesHistory.empty: No beneficiaries match your search or filters.
beneficiariesHistory.emptyDb: No beneficiaries in the system yet.
beneficiariesHistory.noDeliveriesYet: No delivered distributions yet for this beneficiary.
beneficiariesHistory.noLines: No line items on this delivery.

adminOverride.selfUsername: Your username (required when deleting your own account)
adminOverride.warning: This action is permanently logged. Hard deletes remove rows; archives keep history but hide records from normal lists.
adminOverride.mustTypeDelete: Type the word DELETE exactly (all caps) to confirm.

relations.stock: Stock quantities, reservations, movements, or distribution lines
relations.distributions: Distribution records linked to this user

adminOverride.selfUsernameMismatch: Type your username exactly in the confirmation field.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Create Admin and Delivery accounts only
users.deleteDesc: Normal delete is blocked for this user. Super-admins can continue with a typed confirmation.
users.dialogDesc: The user may be asked to change password on first login if you enable it

stock.title: Stock
stock.subtitle: Quantities, reservations, and low-stock alerts
stock.deleteConfirm: This cannot be undone if no distributions reference this row.

categories.title: Aid categories
categories.subtitle: Manage categories, catalog items, and activation
categories.tabOverviewHint: Open a category tab to view and edit its catalog items, or use the overview cards below.
categories.tabSingleHint: Manage catalog items for this category.
categories.noCategorySelected: Select a category from the tabs above.
categories.beneficiariesNeedingSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or area…
categories.beneficiariesNeedingEmpty: No beneficiaries currently need this category.

distributions.title: Distribution & delivery
distributions.subtitle: Manual item selection — stock deducts when the assigned driver confirms delivery
distributions.searchPlaceholder: Search by beneficiary, phone, address, driver, or item...
distributions.deliverDesc: On-hand stock will be reduced by the delivered quantities for each line (defaults to the requested amount).
distributions.assignDriverDesc: Choose a delivery user for this distribution.
distributions.cancelBody: The distribution will be marked cancelled. Stock is not touched while pending.
distributions.deleteBody: Only pending distributions can be deleted. This removes the record permanently.

distributionNew.title: New distribution
distributionNew.subtitle: Choose beneficiary, then pick stock lines and quantities
distributionNew.step3Desc: See the beneficiary’s registered needs below, then choose stock lines and quantities to send.
distributionNew.beneficiaryNeedsDesc: Needs recorded on the beneficiary profile (reference only).
distributionNew.allocationDesc: Pick stock lines and quantities. You can differ from the needs above if required.
distributionNew.noNeedsRecorded: No category needs are recorded for this beneficiary. Add stock lines below.
distributionNew.prefillNeedPickStock: Some lines need a stock item chosen (no matching available stock for that category).
distributionNew.beneficiarySearchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, area, or address…
distributionNew.needLines: Add at least one stock line with quantity.
distributionNew.noStock: No stock rows with available quantity.

profile.title: My account
profile.changePasswordDesc: You will be signed out on all devices after changing

beneficiaryNew.title: New beneficiary
beneficiaryNew.subtitle: Fill in data carefully — it can be edited later
beneficiaryNew.phoneOptionalHint: Optional — exactly 8 digits (Lebanese local number, no country code).
beneficiaryNew.streetHint: Optional: building, floor, landmark, camp/block, or other housing details.
beneficiaryNew.needsDesc: Use Can cook if it applies. For each category, add optional notes and a quantity (1 or more) if needed; leave quantity blank or 0 if not needed.
beneficiaryNew.needsDescItems: Use Can cook if it applies. For each aid category, tick the category if this household needs something from it, then add optional notes and quantities per item (0 or empty means none for that item).
beneficiaryNew.noCatalogItems: No catalog items are defined yet. Add aid categories and items in Aid categories.
beneficiaryNew.categoryNoItems: No items in this category yet.
beneficiaryNew.categoryItemsCollapsedHint: Items are hidden — expand to edit notes and quantities.
beneficiaryNew.recordStatusHint: Inactive files stay in the directory but are hidden from operational lists and new distributions.
beneficiaryNew.validationPhoneMin: If you enter a phone number, use at least 3 characters
beneficiaryNew.validationPhoneFormat: Enter exactly 8 digits, or leave the phone field empty
beneficiaryNew.validationAreaInvalid: Choose a valid area from the list
beneficiaryNew.validationHousehold: Household size must be a positive number
beneficiaryNew.validationCategoryQty: Quantity for {{name}} must be 1 or more, or leave blank
beneficiaryNew.validationItemNeedQty: Quantity for "{{name}}" ({{category}}) must be at least 1, or leave blank to use 1
beneficiaryNew.validationCategoryQty: Category quantity for "{{name}}" must be a whole number (0 or greater)

beneficiaryDetail.subtitle: Beneficiary file — full history
beneficiaryDetail.editDesc: Update details, Can cook, optional notes per category, and quantities; use blank or 0 to remove a category need
beneficiaryDetail.inactiveNotice: This beneficiary is inactive and excluded from operational workflows.
beneficiaryDetail.itemNeedsDesc: Grouped by aid category — quantities and notes from the beneficiary file.
beneficiaryDetail.notNeededHint: Items explicitly marked as not needed.
beneficiaryDetail.distDesc: What was requested, delivered, and who delivered
